name: Montana DLI Construction Contractor Registration Search

agency.name: Montana Department of Labor and Industry

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official contractor registration search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Montana Construction Contractor Registration and Independent Contractor Exemption Certificate records exposed by DLI search paths
knownExclusions: Construction Contractor Registration is not the same as a full trade license or endorsement for every construction activity.
Professional and occupational licenses, local permits, business registrations, and non-DLI authorizations may require separate official sources.
Workers compensation coverage and exemption details need source-specific interpretation before being normalized as compliance facts.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer stable official search or export options before any automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official DLI registration-search metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, registration, exemption, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The official DLI page redirects to an interactive contractor-registration and exemption-certificate search; no stable bulk file or API was documented.
researchNotes: The source is contractor-specific but combines Construction Contractor Registration and Independent Contractor Exemption Certificate concepts that must remain distinct from trade licensing and workers compensation coverage.
maintainerNotes: Keep CCR, ICEC, professional licenses, and workers compensation concepts separate until their source semantics are reviewed.

researchEvidence.note: Official DLI page confirmed the current interactive registration lookup, JavaScript dependency, and separate CCR, ICEC, and professional-license concepts.

blocker.summary: The contractor-registration lookup is interactive and has no documented stable bulk or API contract suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
